_warning: HAND-AUTHORED wiring between the East Blue 2.5D simulation pack and the atlas. Each scene anchors to a canon event slug (preferred: the scene and the /event page then share one spoiler gate and one coordinate), an island slug, or — only where no canon coordinate exists — a literal sea position. check_simulations.py enforces: event anchors never open before the event occurred; island anchors never open before the island debuts; literal anchors must carry a NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION note.
_semantics: The anchor decides WHERE a scene plays and inherits nothing else. Chapter gating comes from the pack's own verified chapter_gate; the check only proves the two calendars can never disagree in the leaking direction.

luffy-punches-alvida.note: Hand-authored: Alvida's ship at sea between Foosha Village and Shells Town; no canon coordinate exists for the deck fight. NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga.

east-blue-grand-line-vows.note: Hand-authored: open sea on the Reverse Mountain approach. Deliberately NOT anchored to reverse-mountain (island debuts ch101, after this scene's ch100 gate) nor to the into-the-grand-line event (occurs ch101) — either would leak. NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga.
